item.title: Magician Lord on SNK Neo Geo AES
item.description: In the realm of classic arcade gaming, few titles command the same level of awe and nostalgia as Magician Lord on the SNK Neo Geo. Released in 1990, this side-scrolling platformer stands as a testament to the ingenuity of its time.
